title: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.1 now available as a Databricks-hosted foundation model
body: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic's [Claude Opus 4.1](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#claude-opus-4-1) a Databricks-hosted foundation model. You can access this model using [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis).
